title: Luffy Finds the Execution Platform
description: On pages 1–4, luffy finds the execution platform focuses on Luffy, Buggy, Alvida, Smoker as luffy explores the town of the Pirate King while Buggy and Alvida prepare revenge.
scene: On pages 1–4, luffy finds the execution platform focuses on Luffy, Buggy, Alvida, Smoker as luffy explores the town of the Pirate King while Buggy and Alvida prepare revenge.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You normally wouldn't see these tuna around these parts, but one just so happened to swim up here from the southern seas.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: And so I snatched it right up with my fishing pole!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: shall i cut it up for you?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Thank you very much for your generosity, sir!

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: Damn it, where'd that beautiful lady I saw just now disappear to?

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: What does he need at the supermarket?

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: Holy crap! These eggs are so cheap!

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: What is he, a house- wife...?

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: But only one cartor per person

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: You sure you even have enough money?

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: Of course I do! how rude.

dialogue.speaker: Dragon
dialogue.text: At this rate, there'll be a rainstorm coming...

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: Darn, I wanted to look around a bit more too...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Do you have any big vinyl bags?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Vinyl bags? But it's not even raining.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: So this is what the pirate King saw,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Hey, you! Get down from there this instant!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Because that's a special execution stand that belongs to the world government!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: So get down from there IMM...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Oh, don't be so uptight about the rules,

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: I've been looking all over for you, Luffy...! It's been awhile.

summary: This part turns Loguetown into a trap, bringing old enemies and Marine pressure together around Luffy.
